children.text: their satisfaction with the corporation and the applicable national governing body; and
the behaviors, attitudes, and feelings within the corporation and the applicable national governing body relating to sexual harassment and abuse.

children.heading: .—Consultation
children.label: b .—Consultation
children.text: A contract under subsection (a) shall require the independent third-party organization to develop the survey in consultation with the Center.

children.heading: .—Prohibition on Interference
children.label: c .—Prohibition on Interference
children.text: If the corporation or a national governing body makes any effort to undermine the independence of, introduce bias into, or otherwise influence a survey under subsection (a), such activity shall be reported immediately to Congress.

children.heading: .—Public Availability
children.label: d .—Public Availability
children.text: The corporation shall make the results of each such survey available to the public on an internet website of the corporation.
